'''nachara''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:seachanger|seachanger]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-ch-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:seachanger|seachanger]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| nachara
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:næchæræth|næchæræth]] || [[word:næchæræj|næchæræj]] || [[word:næchæræsh|næchæræsh]] || [[word:næchæræ|næchæræ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:nachacharath|nachacharath]] || [[word:nachacharaj|nachacharaj]] || [[word:nachacharash|nachacharash]] || [[word:nachachara|nachachara]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:nacharath|nacharath]] || [[word:nacharaj|nacharaj]] || [[word:nacharash|nacharash]] || [[word:nachara|nachara]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:nachafrath|nachafrath]] || [[word:nachafraj|nachafraj]] || [[word:nachafrash|nachafrash]] || [[word:nachafraf|nachafraf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:nacharatha|nacharatha]] || [[word:nacharaja|nacharaja]] || [[word:nacharasha|nacharasha]] || [[word:nacharaka|nacharaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:nacharath|nacharath]] || [[word:nacharaj|nacharaj]] || [[word:nacharash|nacharash]] || [[word:nachara|nachara]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:nacharathal|nacharathal]] || [[word:nacharajal|nacharajal]] || [[word:nacharashal|nacharashal]] || [[word:nacharakal|nacharakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:nacharathatha|nacharathatha]] || [[word:nacharajaja|nacharajaja]] || [[word:nacharashasha|nacharashasha]] || [[word:nacharaka|nacharaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:nacharathan|nacharathan]] || [[word:nacharajan|nacharajan]] || [[word:nacharashan|nacharashan]] || [[word:nacharakan|nacharakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:nacharathaoro|nacharathaoro]] || [[word:nacharajaoro|nacharajaoro]] || [[word:nacharashaoro|nacharashaoro]] || [[word:nacharakaoro|nacharakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|ed5025b}}
